justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic UPDATE fix proposed with exact SQL, TOCTOU named explicitly, safe_to_deploy false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named explicitly in the finding title and explanation
Atomic conditional UPDATE with exact SQL provided as fix
Partial failure between addItem and decrementStock identified as separate Critical finding with transaction-based fix
Bonus: caught negative quantity input validation vulnerability — goes beyond rubric expectations
Clear reproduction steps with concrete numeric examples for each finding
